SELECT county.county_id FROM county
JOIN election ON county.county_id = election.district
JOIN party ON election.party = party.party_id
WHERE party.year = 2006.0 AND party.us_senate = 'Hillary Rodham Clinton' AND party.lieutenant_governor = 'David Paterson'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which county entities having at least one related election record (linked on county.county_id = election.district), whose election record itself has at least one related party record (linked on election.party = party.party_id) with year equal to '2006.0' and us senate equal to 'Hillary Rodham Clinton' and lieutenant governor equal to 'David Paterson'?

qa_pairs.question: Which counties had elections on the Economic Matters committee where the party included Sandra Frankel as lieutenant governor, Eliot Spitzer as attorney general, and Charles Schumer as US Senate?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT county.county_id FROM county
JOIN election ON county.county_id = election.district
JOIN party ON election.party = party.party_id
WHERE party.lieutenant_governor = 'Sandra Frankel' AND election.committee = 'Economic Matters' AND party.attorney_general = 'Eliot Spitzer' AND party.us_senate = 'Charles Schumer'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which county entities having at least one related election record (linked on county.county_id = election.district) with committee equal to 'Economic Matters', whose election record itself has at least one related party record (linked on election.party = party.party_id) with lieutenant governor equal to 'Sandra Frankel' and attorney general equal to 'Eliot Spitzer' and us senate equal to 'Charles Schumer'?

qa_pairs.question: Which counties with a population of 79000 have elections where the committee is Ways and Means and the party is Working Families led by governor Eliot Spitzer and comptroller Alan Hevesi?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT county.county_id FROM county
JOIN election ON county.county_id = election.district
JOIN party ON election.party = party.party_id
WHERE party.governor = 'Eliot Spitzer' AND party.party = 'Working Families' AND election.committee = 'Ways and Means' AND party.comptroller = 'Alan Hevesi' AND county.population = 79000.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which county entities with population equal to '79000.0', having at least one related election record (linked on county.county_id = election.district) with committee equal to 'Ways and Means', whose election record itself has at least one related party record (linked on election.party = party.party_id) with governor equal to 'Eliot Spitzer' and party equal to 'Working Families' and comptroller equal to 'Alan Hevesi'?

qa_pairs.question: Which counties named Howard have elections where the committee is Health and Government Operations, counties represented is 13, the comptroller is John Faso, and the US Senate status is (no election)?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT county.county_id FROM county
JOIN election ON county.county_id = election.district
JOIN party ON election.party = party.party_id
WHERE party.comptroller = 'John Faso' AND party.us_senate = '(no election)' AND election.counties_represented = '13' AND election.committee = 'Health and Government Operations' AND county.county_name = 'Howard'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which county entities with county name equal to 'Howard', having at least one related election record (linked on county.county_id = election.district) with counties represented equal to '13' and committee equal to 'Health and Government Operations', whose election record itself has at least one related party record (linked on election.party = party.party_id) with comptroller equal to 'John Faso' and us senate equal to '(no election)'?

qa_pairs.question: Which counties named Howard have a population of 21000, a zip code of D21, and are linked to elections representing exactly 13 counties with Eliot Spitzer as attorney general?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT county.county_id FROM county
JOIN election ON county.county_id = election.district
JOIN party ON election.party = party.party_id
WHERE party.attorney_general = 'Eliot Spitzer' AND county.zip_code = 'D21' AND county.population = 21000.0 AND election.counties_represented = '13' AND county.county_name = 'Howard'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which county entities with zip code equal to 'D21' and population equal to '21000.0' and county name equal to 'Howard', having at least one related election record (linked on county.county_id = election.district) with counties represented equal to '13', whose election record itself has at least one related party record (linked on election.party = party.party_id) with attorney general equal to 'Eliot Spitzer'?

qa_pairs.question: Which counties are associated with elections where the attorney general is Eliot Spitzer, the comptroller is Carl McCall, the committee is Environmental Matters (Vice-Chair), the first elected year is 1994.0, and counties represented is 12.1 12A?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT county.county_id FROM county
JOIN election ON county.county_id = election.district
JOIN party ON election.party = party.party_id
WHERE party.attorney_general = 'Eliot Spitzer' AND election.counties_represented = '12.1 12A' AND election.first_elected = 1994.0 AND party.comptroller = 'Carl McCall' AND election.committee = 'Environmental Matters (Vice-Chair)'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which county entities having at least one related election record (linked on county.county_id = election.district) with counties represented equal to '12.1 12A' and first elected equal to '1994.0' and committee equal to 'Environmental Matters (Vice-Chair)', whose election record itself has at least one related party record (linked on election.party = party.party_id) with attorney general equal to 'Eliot Spitzer' and comptroller equal to 'Carl McCall'?
